2026-06-19PMOMinistries and Ministers of State ActOrder Terminating the Assignment of the Honourable Nathalie Provost and Assigning the Honourable Nathalie Provost to Assist the Minister of the Environment, the Minister of Fisheries and Oceans and the Minister of Natural ResourcesOrder terminating the Assignment of the Honourable Nathalie Provost made by Order in Council P.C. 2025-478 of May 13, 2025; and assigns the Honourable Nathalie Provost, Minister of State (Nature) to be styled Secretary of State (Nature), to assist the Minister of the Environment, the Minister of Fisheries and Oceans and the Minister of Natural Resources in the carrying out of those Ministers’ responsibilities.N/A
act: Ministries and Ministers of State Act
subject: Order Terminating the Assignment of the Honourable Nathalie Provost and Assigning the Honourable Nathalie Provost to Assist the Minister of the Environment, the Minister of Fisheries and Oceans and the Minister of Natural Resources
precis: Order terminating the Assignment of the Honourable Nathalie Provost made by Order in Council P.C. 2025-478 of May 13, 2025; and assigns the Honourable Nathalie Provost, Minister of State (Nature) to be styled Secretary of State (Nature), to assist the Minister of the Environment, the Minister of Fisheries and Oceans and the Minister of Natural Resources in the carrying out of those Ministers’ responsibilities.
